Header.subtitle: A webinar platform designed for marketers to host jaw-dropping experiences that drive revenue.
Header.title: Captivate & Convert

HowItWorks.intro: Manage your experience from start to finish, from integrations to registration and from interactive stage elements to post-event data, it’s all here.

analyze.description: Track the success of your events with deep insights and analytics measured across the entire attendee experience.
analyze.title: Analyze

create.description: Welcome Studio gives you all the tools you need to create and host virtual experiences that look awesome and put your brand centerstage.
create.title: Create

engage.description: Cut through the yawns, grab your audience’s attention, and turn passive attendees into active participants.
engage.title: Engage

HowItWorks.title: How it works

bitwise.author: Talisha Brantley
bitwise.quote: “Before Welcome, I had to get a switcher, use Ecamm, OBS and always needed this or that to make it all work. Now, one or two people can run our virtual events easily without any special equipment. With just one platform, we can do everything we want.”

dribbble.author: Madeleine Sava
dribbble.quote: "The Welcome experience has been 10 out of 10. When our sponsors like Facebook are considering sponsoring our events, Welcome is our "secret weapon"

salesforce.author: Ally Masi
salesforce.quote: "We chose Welcome because it’s intuitive, beautifully designed, and made for attendee interaction, making it the perfect way to uplevel our experiences. The Slack-like chat, on-stage Q&A, and polling has increased audience engagement."

HomeMetadata.description: A webinar platform designed for marketers to host jaw-dropping experiences that drive revenue.
